label: Legalized
definition: Adult use is legal under national policy, with regulated supply and access.

label: Medical only
definition: Medical access is legal under prescription or regulated programs.

label: Decriminalized
definition: Possession is not a criminal offense, but sale may still be illegal.

label: Illegal
definition: Possession and use remain illegal under national policy.

label: Restricted / experimental
definition: Limited pilots or partial legalization with significant restrictions.
